name: Ghoul
description: Hungry dead. Faster than zombies, smarter than skeletons, and driven by a need to feed.

sensory.sight: hunched, grey-skinned, too fast for something dead — it moves like a spider wearing a person
sensory.sound: a wet, eager chittering, claws scraping stone
sensory.feel: cold paralysis spreading from where its claws touch skin

encounter_hooks: a graveyard with chewed bones scattered outside the fence
livestock found half-eaten, in a way no animal would leave
a sickly sweet smell rising from a cellar or cave entrance
notes: Ghouls are the first undead that feel actively evil rather than mechanically animated. Their paralytic touch makes them disproportionately dangerous for their CR. In Threadhallow, ghouls might be what happens when a Frayed One loses the last shred of its humanity.
